Rewarding Style, Ready for you
  * 3% Reward Points On Shoppers Stop Purchases
  * Welcome Voucher Worth ₹500
  * Shoppers Stop Silver Edge Membership

[ Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&dedupe=N&mc_id=website_organic_shoppers_stop_prod_pg_sticky_footer&icid=website_organic_shoppers_stop_prod_pg_sticky_footer#nbb "Apply Now ")
### More benefits than ever before 
Shopping Benefits
  * Reward Points worth ₹500 per month for a purchase of ₹15,000 or above on weekends at Shoppers Stop.


Reward Benefits
  * 3% Reward Points on every Shopper Stop purchase


Welcome Benefits
  * ₹500 worth of Shoppers Stop voucher from Shoppers Stop, redeemable on any transaction at Shoppers Stop store* via your Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * 1% Reward Points on non-Shoppers Stop spends
  * Complimentary Shoppers Stop Silver Edge membership worth ₹350
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver


View More 
![Shoppers Stop Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### UPI Benefits
  * Link RuPay Credit Card to UPI for scan-and-pay transactions
  * To Know more about UPI purchases on Credit card [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/rupay-cc-on-upi)


View More 
![Shoppers Stop Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience
  * Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards
  * Protection against fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card "View More")
![Shoppers Stop Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible? 
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 60 years 
  * **Income (Monthly)** - ₹20,000


Self Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 65 years 
  * **Annual ITR** > ₹6,00,000 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save big every year—just like countless Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card holders. 
[Calculate Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_shoppersstophdfcbankcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb "Calculate Now")
![Shoppers Stop Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof 
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof 
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN 
  * Step 2 - Confirm your details 
  * Step 3 - Select your Card 
  * Step 4 - Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_shoppersstophdfcbankcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb "Apply Now")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees and Charges

###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹299/- + Applicable Taxes


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card Fees and Charges.
![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Reward and Redemption 
  * Redeem Reward Points on NetBanking where 1 Reward Point = ₹1 Rupee when redeemed against Shoppers Stop vouchers.
  * For other options please refer the table below:

  
| **Avenue of Redemption**  | **1 Reward Point Value**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | 0.25  |  
| Cash Back  | 0.20  |  
| Airmiles  | 0.25  |  
| Unified SmartBuy (Flights/Hotels)  | 0.20  |  
![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit (From 1st Jan, 2023) 
  * Accrual of Reward Points on Grocery Spends will be capped at 1,000 points per month per customer.
  * No Reward Points accrual on Spends made on Rental and Government category payments.
  * 1% Fees to be charged on rental transactions - from the 2nd rental transaction done every calendar month.
  * 1% Mark-Up charges to be applied on all International DCC transactions.


![Redemption Limit \(From 1st Jan, 2023\)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Features 
**Reward Points Validity**
  * Reward Points are valid for 2 years. 


**Zero Lost Card Liability**
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre. 


![Reward Points Validity](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Smart EMI 
  * You have the option to convert big spends into [SmartEMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi), after purchases on your Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card. 
  * Enjoy attractive interest rates and conveniently repay over 9 to 36 months.
  * Get credit into your HDFC Bank Account in seconds. 
  * The loan is pre-approved so no documentation is required. 


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Revolving Credit 
The Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit Card offers revolving credit at a nominal interest rate. 
  * Revolving credit allows you to use a line of credit up to a specified limit without a fixed number of payments. 
  * You have the flexibility to use the funds as needed and only pay interest on the amount used. 
  * This facility ensures continuous access to funds, making it a valuable emergency cash reserve for unexpected financial challenges. 


![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.  

  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.  

  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card/pdfs/card-member-agreement-shoppers-stop.pdf) to view Card Member Agreement Details.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card/pdfs/SS-T-and-C-latest.pdf) for product specific T&C


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_shoppersstophdfcbankcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/ "https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/") to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/ "https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/") and our staff will help you with the application.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Value Chart for Customers 
**Shoppers Stop Credit Card- Value Chart**  
| Reward Points Categories  | Spends Category  | Avg Monthly Spends  | Annual Spend  |  Savigs  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| **3% Back as Reward Points for Spends in Shoppers Stop**  | SS spend  | 5000  | 60000  | 1800  |  
| SS welcome voucher  | -  | -  | 500  |  
| SS Silver membership  | -  | -  | 350  |  
| Weekend offer*  | 15000  | 75000  | 4250  |  
| Total  | 20000  | 135000  | 6900  |  
| **Total savings on Shoppers Stop spends**  |   |   | **5.1%**  |  
|   |  
| **1% Back as Reward Points on All other spends**  | Includes Groceries, Hotel and flights, Dining etc  | 10000  | 120000  | 1200  |  
| **Total savings on all other spends**  |   |   | **1.00%**  |  
| **1% Fuel Surcharge Waiver (250/ Statement cycle)**  | Fuel  | 2500  | 30000  | 300  |  
| **TOTAL**  |   | **32500**  | **285000**  | **8400**  |  
| **Overall Savings Potential**  |   |   |   | **2.95%**  |  
Now save 2.95% and more on your annual spends using Shoppers Stop HDFC Bank Credit card  

*Assuming annual SS spends includes 5 weekend visits (once in a month five times in a year) and bill value should be >=15k  

**Assuming standard market rates for Lounge access
**Spends are indicative and may vary for different customers
